headline: Ventas Stock (VTR) Rides the ‘Gray Wave’ with a Strong Dividend — I’m Bullish
summary: Ventas (VTR) stock is riding the “gray wave” — a fast-approaching yet less-discussed trend driven by the U.S.’s rapidly aging population. As a leading senior housing real estate investment trust (REIT), Ventas directly benefits from this demographic tailwind, making it an attractive dividend stock with a 2.4% yield, double that of the S&P 500 (SPX). I’m bullish on Ventas because of this demographic shift, its promising dividend, and a history of strong total returns. The Gray Wave Is Rising Acco
